emails.subject: Clarification
emails.body: Clarification Rick: I forgot to ask you about my last day when we talked this morning. I was hoping that it could be next Friday? Is that possible? Thanks, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Clarification
emails.body: RE: Clarification Are you kidding?.......if not. I would suggest November 12, the day we are likely to use on a uniform basis. To: Shapiro, Richard

emails.subject: RE: Clarification
emails.body: Any flexibility to move it up to November 1? If there's no flexibility, that's fine. To: Yoho, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Clarification
emails.body: Let's wait and see, but the 12th is probably better from a transition perspective. To: Shapiro, Richard

emails.subject: RE: Clarification
emails.body: If there is a specific need, let me know. To: Shapiro, Richard

emails.subject: RE: Clarification
emails.body: other than wanting to go to Ohio to see my family, not really. if i can use my vacation in the meantime, that won't be a problem. should I make plans to go to Colorado? or should maggy go in my place? Lisa To: Yoho, Lisa
